name: Bridal Solitaires
description: Timeless solitaire rings crafted for the most cherished occasion of your life. Each stone is hand-selected for its brilliance, fire, and heart.

name: Everyday Elegance
description: Lightweight, minimal, and effortlessly wearable — designed for the woman who deserves brilliance from morning to midnight.

name: Heritage Gold
description: Inspired by Mughal artistry and reimagined for the modern woman. Rich 22-karat gold with precision-set diamonds.

name: Diamond Earrings
description: From subtle studs to dramatic chandeliers — every pair is cut to catch the light and hold your gaze.

name: Mangalsutra
description: The eternal symbol of love, reinterpreted for the contemporary bride. Diamond-studded, thoughtfully designed.

name: Statement Rings
description: Bold, architectural, unforgettable. Rings that announce your arrival before you say a word.
